title: RAS Agent Rain-on-Grid Workflow Configuration
description: Configuration schema for generalized rain-on-grid workflow orchestration.

aep_years.description: Annual exceedance probability return periods, expressed as years.

precip_timestep_minutes.description: Precipitation hyetograph temporal resolution in minutes. This is not the HEC-RAS computational timestep, output interval, or mapping interval. MRMS event workflows typically use 60 minutes to match GaugeCorr_QPE_01H; synthetic Atlas 14 workflows commonly use 5-15 minutes.

peak_position_percent.description: Percent of storm duration at which the design storm peaks.

min_depth_threshold_ft.description: Minimum mapped flood depth threshold in feet.

target_crs.description: Optional runtime CRS override. Null keeps the standard EPSG:5070 workflow CRS.

calibration_gauges.description: Optional calibration gauge records in target CRS coordinates.

mock.description: Run the workflow in mock/screening mode.
